Donor Data Protection

Security worthy of your donors' trust

Every agent runs in an isolated container with strict role-based access. Donor data, beneficiary information, and financial records stay protected—even if an agent is compromised.

Database Protection

Agents operate in sandboxed containers with strict access controls. Read-only access prevents accidental deletions or unauthorized modifications to donor and beneficiary records.

Cannot access unrestricted funds
Cannot modify donor payment info
Query program metrics and outcomes

Communication Guards

Draft-only mode for donor emails and stakeholder communications. Bulk sends and sensitive messages require explicit human approval. All outreach is logged and auditable.

Send to >500 donor list
Access major donor contact details
Draft thank-you and update emails

Instruction Firewall

Agents cannot instruct staff to bypass policies or approve expenses outside workflows. Prevents social engineering of your team.

Request employee credentials
Bypass approval workflows
Escalate within defined rules

Human in the Loop

You approve everything that matters

Fund transfers, bulk donor communications, and anomaly-detected actions all require human approval. Emergency controls are always within reach.

FAQ

Common questions

Each agent runs in a sandboxed container with strict Role-Based Access Control (RBAC). They physically cannot access data outside their scope—it's not just policy, it's architecture. Development agents can draft donor emails but cannot access your CRM. Finance agents can categorize expenses but cannot move funds between restricted and unrestricted accounts.
